falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4950 would violate the August 2024 fractal's support shelf and invalidate the bottoming thesis, confirming distribution rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX >25 would contradict the blowoff score of 39, which embeds complacency/late-cycle positioning; persistent fear premium indicates the pattern match captured a false breakdown, not a durable bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is below 5100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal flight-to-safety bid in bonds alongside equity weakness, confirming macro deterioration rather than the 'growth scare resolved' narrative implied by the August 2024 bottom analog; the pattern match fails if rates and equities decouple into recession pricing

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
